goal: Author docs/PRD.md as the experiment contract and add a baseline remote validation check for that contract.
definition_of_done: docs/PRD.md remains aligned to project intent, a repo-level PRD contract check exists, local validation is green, and PR #1 shows a real remote check.
most_important_next_action: Add the smallest GitHub-side validation check for docs/PRD.md so PR #1 has a real remote status signal.
request_summary: Keep the PRD contract intact and make the published PR reviewable with a real remote check.
delivery_summary: This rework pass adds a minimal PRD contract validation path for local and GitHub execution.
main_difficulty: The repo currently has no configured GitHub checks, so the docs-only PR cannot satisfy the review gate.
next_step_summary: Commit the PRD validation script and GitHub Actions workflow, then rerun validation and push PR #1.
